use_cases: Hero section interactive lighting that follows mouse movement for engagement
Portfolio or landing page ambient lighting effects with customizable colors
Interactive background elements that respond to user cursor position
Product showcase lighting effects with directional glow transitions
ai_summary: An interactive lamp component that creates dynamic 3D lighting effects following mouse movement. Features customizable shine colors, directional light casting (left, right, top, bottom), and smooth transition animations. Uses CSS box-shadow manipulation to simulate realistic light glow and spread effects with varying opacity gradients.
